name: psycle-class-finder-ios
description: Psycle Class Finder — iOS app via Capacitor

scripts.sync: cp ../index.html ../psycle-finder.html ../login.html ../manifest.json ../sw.js www/ && cp ../js/*.js www/ && cp ../css/*.css www/ && sed -i '' 's|js/||g; s|css/||g' www/psycle-finder.html www/sw.js && sed -i '' 's|</body>|<script defer src="native-bridge.js"></script>\n</body>|' www/psycle-finder.html && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build: npm run sync && npx cap open ios
